SD_TECH_PENGUIN_20260413_2145_OPPORTUNIT.description: Sales-pipeline opportunities; one row per identified deal with the expected revenue, closing probability, and the product being proposed.

SD_TECH_PENGUIN_20260413_2145_PRODUCTS.description: Product master (SKU catalog); one row per distinct finished good sold or procured, with list price and category.

SD_TECH_PENGUIN_20260413_2145_PURCHASE_O.description: Inbound purchase orders issued to suppliers; one row per PO line with ordered quantity, total cost, and fulfillment status.

SD_TECH_PENGUIN_20260413_2145_SUPPLIERS.description: Supplier master; one row per approved vendor with region, lead time, and quality rating.

SD_TECH_PENGUIN_20260413_2145_OPPORTUNIT.name: Opportunity ID
SD_TECH_PENGUIN_20260413_2145_OPPORTUNIT.description: Unique identifier for a sales opportunity; primary key of the opportunities table.

SD_TECH_PENGUIN_20260413_2145_OPPORTUNIT.name: Customer Name
SD_TECH_PENGUIN_20260413_2145_OPPORTUNIT.description: Account / company name the opportunity is being pursued with.

SD_TECH_PENGUIN_20260413_2145_OPPORTUNIT.name: Opportunity Stage
SD_TECH_PENGUIN_20260413_2145_OPPORTUNIT.description: Sales-stage label in the pipeline (e.g., Prospecting, Qualification, Proposal, Negotiation, Closed Won/Lost).

SD_TECH_PENGUIN_20260413_2145_OPPORTUNIT.name: Expected Close Date
SD_TECH_PENGUIN_20260413_2145_OPPORTUNIT.description: Forecasted date on which the opportunity is projected to close.

SD_TECH_PENGUIN_20260413_2145_OPPORTUNIT.name: Product ID (Opportunities)
SD_TECH_PENGUIN_20260413_2145_OPPORTUNIT.description: Foreign key to the Products table identifying the product tied to this opportunity.

SD_TECH_PENGUIN_20260413_2145_OPPORTUNIT.name: Source System (Opportunities)
SD_TECH_PENGUIN_20260413_2145_OPPORTUNIT.description: Upstream system of record (e.g., Salesforce, Dynamics) from which this opportunity record was ingested.

SD_TECH_PENGUIN_20260413_2145_PRODUCTS.P.name: Product ID
SD_TECH_PENGUIN_20260413_2145_PRODUCTS.P.description: Unique SKU / product identifier; primary key of the product master.

SD_TECH_PENGUIN_20260413_2145_PRODUCTS.P.name: Product Name
SD_TECH_PENGUIN_20260413_2145_PRODUCTS.P.description: Commercial name of the product as shown on invoices and catalogs.

SD_TECH_PENGUIN_20260413_2145_PRODUCTS.P.name: Product Category
SD_TECH_PENGUIN_20260413_2145_PRODUCTS.P.description: Merchandising category the SKU belongs to (e.g., Electronics, Apparel, Hardware).

SD_TECH_PENGUIN_20260413_2145_PRODUCTS.S.name: Source System (Products)
SD_TECH_PENGUIN_20260413_2145_PRODUCTS.S.description: Upstream system of record for the product master (e.g., ERP PIM, merchandising).

SD_TECH_PENGUIN_20260413_2145_PURCHASE_O.name: PO Number
SD_TECH_PENGUIN_20260413_2145_PURCHASE_O.description: Human-readable purchase order number used on supplier communications and receipts.

SD_TECH_PENGUIN_20260413_2145_PURCHASE_O.name: Order Date
SD_TECH_PENGUIN_20260413_2145_PURCHASE_O.description: Date the purchase order was issued to the supplier.

SD_TECH_PENGUIN_20260413_2145_PURCHASE_O.name: PO Status
SD_TECH_PENGUIN_20260413_2145_PURCHASE_O.description: Fulfillment status of the PO (e.g., Open, Approved, Shipped, Received, Cancelled).

SD_TECH_PENGUIN_20260413_2145_PURCHASE_O.name: Product ID (Purchase Orders)
SD_TECH_PENGUIN_20260413_2145_PURCHASE_O.description: Foreign key to the Products table identifying the SKU being purchased.

SD_TECH_PENGUIN_20260413_2145_PURCHASE_O.name: Supplier ID (Purchase Orders)
SD_TECH_PENGUIN_20260413_2145_PURCHASE_O.description: Foreign key to the Suppliers table identifying the vendor fulfilling this PO.

SD_TECH_PENGUIN_20260413_2145_PURCHASE_O.name: Source System (Purchase Orders)
SD_TECH_PENGUIN_20260413_2145_PURCHASE_O.description: Upstream procurement system of record (e.g., Ariba, Coupa, SAP MM).

SD_TECH_PENGUIN_20260413_2145_SUPPLIERS..name: Supplier ID
SD_TECH_PENGUIN_20260413_2145_SUPPLIERS..description: Unique vendor identifier; primary key of the supplier master.

SD_TECH_PENGUIN_20260413_2145_SUPPLIERS..name: Supplier Name
SD_TECH_PENGUIN_20260413_2145_SUPPLIERS..description: Legal / commercial name of the supplier organization.

SD_TECH_PENGUIN_20260413_2145_SUPPLIERS..name: Supplier Region
SD_TECH_PENGUIN_20260413_2145_SUPPLIERS..description: Geographic region the supplier primarily serves or ships from (e.g., NA, EMEA, APAC, LATAM).

SD_TECH_PENGUIN_20260413_2145_SUPPLIERS..name: Source System (Suppliers)
SD_TECH_PENGUIN_20260413_2145_SUPPLIERS..description: Upstream system of record for the supplier master.

SD_TECH_PENGUIN_20260413_2145_OPPORTUNIT.name: Total Expected Revenue
SD_TECH_PENGUIN_20260413_2145_OPPORTUNIT.description: Sum of opportunity expected revenue across the pipeline — gross (not probability-weighted).

SD_TECH_PENGUIN_20260413_2145_OPPORTUNIT.name: Avg Win Probability %
SD_TECH_PENGUIN_20260413_2145_OPPORTUNIT.description: Average sales-team-entered probability (0–100) that opportunities close won.

SD_TECH_PENGUIN_20260413_2145_PRODUCTS.L.name: Avg List Price
SD_TECH_PENGUIN_20260413_2145_PRODUCTS.L.description: Average of the product list price across the catalog.

SD_TECH_PENGUIN_20260413_2145_PURCHASE_O.name: Total Quantity Ordered
SD_TECH_PENGUIN_20260413_2145_PURCHASE_O.description: Total units ordered across all PO lines.

SD_TECH_PENGUIN_20260413_2145_PURCHASE_O.name: Total PO Cost
SD_TECH_PENGUIN_20260413_2145_PURCHASE_O.description: Total procurement spend across all PO lines, before any rebate adjustments.

SD_TECH_PENGUIN_20260413_2145_SUPPLIERS..name: Avg Supplier Lead Time (Days)
SD_TECH_PENGUIN_20260413_2145_SUPPLIERS..description: Average supplier-committed lead time in days from PO issue to delivery.

SD_TECH_PENGUIN_20260413_2145_SUPPLIERS..name: Avg Supplier Quality Rating
SD_TECH_PENGUIN_20260413_2145_SUPPLIERS..description: Average internal supplier-quality rating (typically 1–5) based on prior shipment QA.
